name: ADENOID CYSTIC CARCINOMA
definition: most common malignancy of lacrimal gland

demographics.Frequency: 29% of all lacrimal epithelial neoplasms; ~ 5% of all primary orbital neoplasms
demographics.Histo: nonencapsulated bland-appearing epithelial cells arranged in nests / chords forming a

discriminating_features: irregular borders with distortion of globe + orbital contents (with more advanced disease)
perineural invasion (lacrimal branch of ophthalmic nerve)

general: irregular borders with distortion of globe + orbital contents (with more advanced disease)
perineural invasion (lacrimal branch of ophthalmic nerve)
